hero.title: Powering Oman's Transport المستقبل
hero.subtitle: Discover the ultimate digital showroom for high-end heavy-duty machines. Engineering mastery from China, delivered with Omani excellence.

maintenance.title: INDUSTRIAL EXCELLENCE
maintenance.subtitle: GLOBAL PRECISION MAINTENANCE
maintenance.description: Our Maintenance Garaje is where engineering mastery meets Omani dedication. We ensure your fleet operates at the pinnacle of performance with absolute precision and unmatched nationwide support.

services.title: Precision Overhaul
services.desc: Deep mechanical restoration using factory-spec precision tools for maximum lifespan.

services.title: Dynamic Balancing
services.desc: High-speed drive shaft and wheel balancing for extreme industrial endurance.

services.title: Fluid Analysis
services.desc: Scientific oil and coolant spectrometry to predict component life and prevent downtime.

services.title: Electronic Calibration
services.desc: Zero-error ECU and sensor tuning for optimal fuel efficiency and power delivery.

maintenance.location_desc: Strategically positioned across the Sultanate—from Muscat to Salalah—to keep your business moving 24/7.

features.title: TECHNICAL SUPREMACY
features.subtitle: Unmatched nationwide support and precision maintenance for your high-performance fleet.
features.hotspot_2_desc: Integrated media and cruise controls with premium tactile response.
features.hotspot_3_desc: Rapid-cool dual-zone climate mastery for extreme thermal comfort.
features.hotspot_4_desc: Air-suspended throne designed for 24-hour industrial operation.
features.hotspot_5_desc: Industrial parking and trailer brake valves for absolute security.
features.hotspot_6_desc: Multi-stage differential locking for extreme terrain traction.
